LightningComponentBundle.description: Visual formula editor for building and saving criteria expressions on Salesforce records. Supports operator insertion, custom metadata type references, and syntax verification. (ISS-002768)

property.name: fieldApiName
property.label: Formula Field API Name
property.description: API name of the field on the record that stores the formula (e.g. Criteria__c).

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API name of the Salesforce object the formula field belongs to (e.g. Study_Requirement_Set__c). Leave blank to inherit from the record page context.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API name of the Salesforce object (e.g. Study_Requirement_Set__c).

property.name: fieldApiName
property.label: Formula Field API Name
property.description: API name of the field that stores the formula (e.g. Criteria__c).

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Salesforce record Id to load and save the formula against.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API name of the Salesforce object (e.g. Study_Requirement_Set__c).

property.name: fieldApiName
property.label: Formula Field API Name
property.description: API name of the field that stores the formula (e.g. Criteria__c).

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Salesforce record Id to load and save the formula against.
